title: Garlic Butter Shrimp
label: Appetizer
description: Juicy shrimp sautéed in garlic butter with a hint of lemon and herbs. Served sizzling hot with a light drizzle of olive oil. A perfect starter to awaken your appetite.

title: Bruschetta Trio
label: Appetizer
description: A selection of toasted bread topped with tomato, basil, and olive oil. Finished with a touch of balsamic glaze for extra depth. Light, fresh, and full of Mediterranean flavor.

title: Grilled Ribeye Steak
label: Main Course
description: Premium ribeye steak grilled to perfection with a smoky crust. Served with roasted vegetables and creamy mashed potatoes. Rich, tender, and packed with bold flavor.

title: Lemon Herb Salmon
label: Main Course
description: Fresh salmon fillet seasoned with lemon and aromatic herbs. Pan-seared for a crispy exterior and juicy center. Served with seasonal greens and light sauce.

title: Chocolate Lava Cake
label: Dessert
description: Warm chocolate cake with a molten center that flows with every bite. Served with vanilla ice cream for a perfect balance. A must-have treat for chocolate lovers.

title: Strawberry Cheesecake
label: Dessert
description: Creamy cheesecake layered over a buttery biscuit base. Topped with fresh strawberries and sweet glaze. Smooth, rich, and delightfully refreshing.

title: Fresh Orange Juice
label: Beverage
description: Freshly squeezed oranges blended into a vibrant juice. Naturally sweet with a refreshing citrus kick. Perfect to complement any meal.

title: Classic Mojito
label: Beverage
description: A refreshing mix of mint leaves, lime, and sparkling soda. Lightly sweetened and served over ice for a cooling effect. A timeless drink with a crisp finish.

title: Crispy Calamari
label: Appetizer
description: Lightly breaded calamari fried until golden and crispy. Served with a zesty garlic aioli dipping sauce. A crunchy and flavorful seafood starter.

title: Caprese Salad
label: Appetizer
description: Fresh mozzarella paired with ripe tomatoes and basil leaves. Drizzled with olive oil and balsamic reduction. A simple yet elegant Italian classic.

title: Chicken Alfredo Pasta
label: Main Course
description: Creamy Alfredo pasta tossed with tender grilled chicken. Finished with parmesan cheese and fresh herbs. Rich, comforting, and full of flavor.

title: Beef Burger Deluxe
label: Main Course
description: Juicy beef patty served in a toasted bun with fresh vegetables. Topped with cheese, house sauce, and crispy onions. A hearty and satisfying classic.

title: Tiramisu
label: Dessert
description: Layers of coffee-soaked ladyfingers and creamy mascarpone. Lightly dusted with cocoa powder for a rich finish. A timeless Italian dessert with bold flavor.

title: Vanilla Panna Cotta
label: Dessert
description: Smooth and creamy panna cotta infused with vanilla. Served with a berry coulis for a fruity contrast. Light, silky, and perfectly balanced.

title: Iced Latte
label: Beverage
description: Chilled espresso combined with cold milk and ice. Smooth and refreshing with a rich coffee taste. Perfect for a quick energy boost.

title: Berry Smoothie
label: Beverage
description: A blend of fresh berries, yogurt, and natural sweeteners. Creamy texture with a vibrant fruity flavor. A healthy and refreshing drink option.

title: Spicy Tuna Tartare
label: Appetizer
description: Fresh tuna finely chopped and mixed with spicy sauce. Served with avocado and crispy chips for texture. A bold and refreshing starter with a modern twist.

title: French Onion Soup
label: Appetizer
description: Slow-cooked caramelized onions in a rich beef broth. Topped with toasted bread and melted cheese. Warm, comforting, and deeply flavorful.

title: BBQ Pork Ribs
label: Main Course
description: Tender pork ribs glazed with smoky barbecue sauce. Slow-cooked until juicy and fall-off-the-bone soft. Served with fries and house coleslaw.

title: Mango Sorbet
label: Dessert
description: Refreshing sorbet made from ripe mangoes and natural ingredients. Light and fruity with a smooth texture. A perfect finish after a rich meal.

title: Espresso
label: Beverage
description: Strong and aromatic espresso brewed from premium beans. Served hot with a rich crema on top. A classic choice for coffee lovers.

title: Green Detox Juice
label: Beverage
description: A healthy blend of green vegetables and fresh fruits. Packed with vitamins and natural energy. Clean, refreshing, and revitalizing.
